_comment: Public MiSTer->APF service map: how each MiSTer framework service maps onto the Analogue-Pocket APF. Derivable from public open-fpga/core-template, agg23/analogue-pocket-utils, and MiSTer's public hps_io/sys framework. Signatures are RTL tokens that reveal the MiSTer service is used in the source core.

services.mister: hps_io + CONF_STR OSD string + emu(...) port contract
services.note: The whole OSD/host contract is re-implemented; menu options become bridge registers or JSON controls. There is no in-core OSD on the Pocket.
services.provenance: public MiSTer hps_io; public open-fpga/core-template core_bridge_cmd.

services.mister: ioctl_download / ioctl_wr / ioctl_addr / ioctl_dout / ioctl_index (ROM stream)
services.apf: data.json dataslots + dataslot_* handshake + a data_loader CDC
services.note: ROM streaming becomes a bridge-fed dataslot. agg23/analogue-pocket-utils data_loader.sv is the CDC that turns 32-bit bridge writes into memory writes, crossing clk_74a->clk_memory via an internal sync_fifo and conditionally byteswapping on bridge_endian_little. Strategy A (common): wrap data_loader to regenerate the exact ioctl_* net names so the original core runs unmodified.
services.provenance: public agg23/analogue-pocket-utils data_loader.sv; observed in public opengateware/agg23 ports.

services.note: Menu status bits become individual bridge registers or interact.json controls.
Controller inputs are decoded from the APF cont*_key/joy words by a gamepad/synch block and mapped via input.json.
Save/NVRAM rides on save dataslots via a data_unloader, signalled per slot.

services.apf: video_rgb[23:0] + video_rgb_clock(_90) + video_de/hs/vs + video.json (via video_mixer -> APF scaler)
services.note: Expand RGB to 24-bit (5->8 or 4->8); replace ce_pix with a real pixel clock; delegate rotation/aspect to the APF scaler via video.json. The MiSTer HDMI/ascal pipeline is dropped.

services.apf: i2s: audio_mclk / audio_dac / audio_lrck (via sound_i2s / audio_mixer + audio_pll)
services.note: There is no parallel PCM bus on the Pocket; convert to serial i2s. An audio PLL output is typically added.

services.mister: sys / sys_top / sys.tcl framework, SD-card FAT, DDR3 framebuffer
services.note: The MiSTer sys framework, SD-card FAT layer, and DDR3 framebuffer have no APF equivalent and are removed; external storage rides on dataslots instead.
services.provenance: public MiSTer sys framework vs public APF (no equivalent).
